capability_assertions.positive: Repository edges expose resolved_id, generation_id, evidence_count, evidence_kinds, confidence, and rationale pointers.
capability_assertions.negative: No canonical repository relationship is accepted without evidence rows.

capability_assertions.positive: Repository context partitions controller-driven, workflow-driven, IaC-driven, and other typed relationships.
Repository story and context preserve workflow artifacts, controller artifacts, Docker, Helm, Kustomize, CloudFormation, and config artifacts.
Framework routes and endpoint surfaces are visible for service repositories with route evidence.
Service deployment trace connects service, delivery evidence, IaC evidence, platforms, and environments without fabricating missing runtime truth.
